title: eulophia lejolyana
intro: Eulophia lejolyana, also known as the Congo orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Eulophia lejolyana include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
